# Download SONIA interest rate

Downloads the Sterling Overnight Index Average (SONIA), the risk-free
reference rate for sterling markets. Available daily from January 1997.

## Usage

``` r
boe_sonia(
  from = "1997-01-02",
  to = Sys.Date(),
  frequency = c("daily", "monthly", "annual"),
  cache = TRUE
)
```

## Source

<https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/boeapps/database/>

## Arguments

- from:

  Date or character (YYYY-MM-DD). Start date. Defaults to
  `"1997-01-02"`.

- to:

  Date or character (YYYY-MM-DD). End date. Defaults to today.

- frequency:

  Character. One of `"daily"` (default), `"monthly"` (monthly average),
  or `"annual"` (annual average).

- cache:

  Logical. Use cached data if available (default `TRUE`).

## Value

A data frame with columns:

- date:

  Date. Observation date.

- rate_pct:

  Numeric. SONIA rate (percent).

## Examples

# \donttest{
boe_sonia(from = "2020-01-01")
